title: 目前体验微信 ClawBot 最丝滑的方式。😄

content.summary: 目前体验微信 ClawBot 最丝滑的方式。😄 WorkAny (@workanyai) WorkAny Bot is the first cloud-hosted OpenClaw with WeChat (ClawBot) support. Try it! Set it up in minutes: 1/Go to workany.bot → choose a plan 2/Deploy your OpenClaw 3/Add WeChat channel🔥 4/Scan QR to log in 5/Chat with your cloud Agent on WeChat🔥🔥🔥 Try it! — https://nitter.net/workanyai/status/2035646521711177968#m
